matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Sociology (The Sociology of Media and Culture) is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The Department of Sociology at the University of Cambridge is a world-class centre for teaching and research in Sociology. It has a proud tradition of research grounded in engagement with contemporary real-world issues.
